---
name: Typo / broken link / small correction
about: Report a typo, grammar error, broken link, or small factual slip
title: "[typo] <short description>"
labels: typo
---

**Where** (file path + optional line or quoted sentence):

<!-- e.g., posts/tech/gorm-preload-mechanism.md, paragraph starting with "GORM's Preload..." -->

**What's wrong:**

<!-- Quote the current text and what it should be. -->

**Suggested fix:**

<!-- Optional — one-line rewrite, or just leave blank and I'll fix it. -->

---

For anything longer than a line or two, consider opening a PR instead —
it's faster for both of us. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
